name: TC-02: Verify Redmine project navigation tabs open the expected public pages @smoke

steps.name: Expected Redmine to be available at https://www.redmine.org/projects/redmine
Query count locator('#main-menu').getByRole('link', { name: 'Overview', exact: true }).first()
Query count locator('#main-menu').getByRole('link', { name: 'Download', exact: true }).first()
Query count locator('#main-menu').getByRole('link', { name: 'Activity', exact: true }).first()
Query count locator('#main-menu').getByRole('link', { name: 'Roadmap', exact: true }).first()
Query count locator('#main-menu').getByRole('link', { name: 'Issues', exact: true }).first()
Query count locator('#main-menu').getByRole('link', { name: 'News', exact: true }).first()
Query count locator('#main-menu').getByRole('link', { name: 'Wiki', exact: true }).first()
Query count locator('#main-menu').getByRole('link', { name: 'Forums', exact: true }).first()
Verify browser runtime has no critical errors
No critical browser console or page errors should be emitted
